title: Reorganize header layout: move dropdown and login button to top left

requirements.summary: Move the BrandingBannerDropdown component to be positioned next to the logo in the top left area of the header
acceptanceCriteria: The dropdown menu is positioned in the top left area of the header, adjacent to the logo
The dropdown remains fully functional with all existing links (About, Privacy Policy, etc.)

file_operations.description: Restructure the header layout to move the BrandingBannerDropdown from its current position to the top left area, adjacent to the logo. Update the flex layout and positioning classes to place the dropdown next to the logo element while maintaining responsive design for both mobile and desktop viewports.

requirements.summary: Reposition the login button to be directly underneath the dropdown menu in the top left area
acceptanceCriteria: The login button appears directly below the dropdown menu
The login button maintains full functionality for authentication

file_operations.description: Move the login/logout button from its current position (right side) to be positioned directly underneath the BrandingBannerDropdown in the top left area. Wrap the dropdown and login button in a vertical flex container to stack them, ensuring the authentication logic and Internet Identity integration remain unchanged.

requirements.summary: Add small spacing between the dropdown menu and login button to ensure easy touch/click targets
acceptanceCriteria: There is visible spacing between the dropdown menu and login button
The spacing is optimized for mobile and desktop interaction

file_operations.description: Apply appropriate spacing utilities (such as gap-2 or space-y-2) between the dropdown menu and login button in the vertical stack to ensure adequate touch/click target separation. Test and adjust spacing to work well on both mobile and desktop viewports for optimal user interaction.
